emails.subject: NGPL Lone Liquidations
emails.body: NGPL Lone Liquidations Phillip I put together a spreadsheet to look at the lone liquidations we have on the summary pages that we will be presenting today and then looking at what is going to hit in the next month. All the turnarounds you mentioned to me for January did happen, but in total we booked another $4 million of expense. This spreadsheet lists the lone liquidations from November and December production down the far left column and ties to our current summary schedule. I put the new liquidations from January production on the right. I hope this is useful to you. Thanks, Cathy
